praatAnalysis.name: Acoustic Analysis

page.title: Jyutping-to-IPA Tool
page.subtitle: The sheet must contain a "Jyutping" column

upload.title: Click to upload or drag files here
upload.info: Supports Jyutping format (for example: jyut6ping3) and can convert initials, finals, tones, and full IPA.

configCard.desc: Configure mapping rules for initials, finals, codas, and tones.

page.title: Table Merge Tool
page.subtitle: Upload a reference sheet and source files to align and merge them in batch

reference.title: Upload Reference Sheet
reference.desc: The reference sheet defines the column structure and character scope. You can upload your own file or use the default reference sheet.
reference.uploadText: Click or drag to upload a reference Excel file

files.title: Upload Source Tables
files.descPrefix: Please upload source tables that have already been processed with
files.descSuffix: . Multiple files will be added to the same merge task.
files.uploadText: Click or drag to upload tables to merge
files.uploadHint: You can add up to 20 Excel files at once

complete.title: Merge Complete
complete.text: The merged file and a task summary are ready for download.

welcome.title: Dialect Table Check Tool
welcome.feature1: Automatically detects multi-character entries, invalid IPA, and missing tones
welcome.feature2: Supports batch editing and command-based editing
welcome.feature3: Click cells to edit and fix issues quickly
welcome.simplifiedConvert: Simplified (converted to Traditional; file content will change)
welcome.uploadTitle: Click or drag a file here
welcome.uploadingHint: Please wait while the file is being processed

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.noOnsetRimeStats: No onset and rime statistics yet

command.title: Command Input
command.placeholder:
Enter one command per line, or separate commands with semicolons

Examples:
c-帥-好
i-帥-jat4
p-'-ʰ
r5>3
s22>33

Multiple commands:
c-帥-好; i-帥-jat4

batchReplace.title: Batch Replace
batchReplace.sourceToneHint: Tone value to replace (1 to 4 digits)
batchReplace.ruToneHint: Only replaces tones that end in stop codas (p, t, k, ʔ, b, d, g)

help.title: Help
help.checkNonSingleChar: Non-single character: the character column should contain exactly one character
help.checkInvalidIpa: Invalid IPA: contains unsupported characters or malformed format
help.checkMissingTone: Missing tone: the IPA ends without a numeric tone marker
help.replaceRuToneDesc: Replace tone values for checked-tone syllables only
help.replaceShuToneDesc: Replace tone values for non-checked-tone syllables only
help.commandHint: Separate multiple commands with semicolons, for example:
help.editCell: Cell editing: click a table cell in edit mode to edit it directly
help.editBatch: Batch editing: enter edit mode and save changes together
help.editCommand: Command mode: process multiple changes in batch

formatHelp.title: File Format Guide
formatHelp.singleCharColumn: Character column: the header can be "單字", "phrase", "单字", "漢字", or "汉字"
formatHelp.singleIpaColumn: IPA column: the header can be "IPA", "ipa", "音標", "音标", or "syllable"
formatHelp.singleNoteColumn: Note column: the header can be "注释", "注釋", "解釋", or "notes"
formatHelp.singleFeature: The system automatically recognizes common header variants.
formatHelp.multiRule1: Column A: the syllable (for example, ka1).
formatHelp.multiRule2: Column B: a group of characters with optional notes (for example, 家｛住所｝ 加[增加] 佳).
formatHelp.multiFeature: The system automatically splits each character in column B and pairs it with the syllable in column A.
formatHelp.gazetteerExcelRule1: Beginning of the line: onset + rime (for example, pan).
formatHelp.gazetteerExcelRule2: Following content must include a bracketed tone number in the form [tone]character｛note｝.
formatHelp.gazetteerExcelFeature: The system recognizes tone numbers inside [ ] or ［ ］ and combines them with the line-initial syllable.
formatHelp.gazetteerWordFeature: Supports complex matching. If an entry contains multiple characters or multiple readings separated by ; or /, the system automatically performs Cartesian-product matching.
